#### Traumatic brain injury 

**Ogonah, M.G.T**, Botchway, S., Yu, R., Schofield, P., & Fazel, S (2025). An umbrella review of health outcomes following traumatic brain injury. *Nature Mental Health*. https://doi.org/10.1038/s44220-024-00356-5 

**Ogonah, M.G.T**. & Botchway, S. (2025) Research Briefing: Physical and mental health after traumatic brain injury. *Nature Mental Health*. https://doi.org/10.1038/s44220-024-00362-7 [Research Briefing]
  
#### Risk prediction 

Seyedsalehi A., Bailey, J., **Ogonah, M. G. T.**, Fanshawe, T. R., & Fazel, S. (2025) Prediction models for self-harm and suicide: a systematic review and critical appraisal. *BMC Medicine*, 23(549). https://doi.org/10.1186/s12916-025-04367-6

**Ogonah, M. G. T.**, Seyedalehi, A., Whiting, D., & Fazel, S. (2023). Violence risk assessment instruments in forensic psychiatric populations: A systematic review and meta-analysis of their performance. *The Lancet Psychiatry*, 10, 780-789. https://doi.org/10.1016/S2215-0366(23)00256-0

#### Simulation training

**Ogonah M. G. T.**, Vega, M. O., Valdearenas, L., Cross, S., & Attoe, C. (2021). Mental health crises in the emergency department: simulation training for interprofessional collaboration and teamwork attitudes. *International Journal of Healthcare Simulation*, 1(1), 11-27. https://www.ijohs.com/article/doi/10.54531/OWXJ2519
